security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: https://tauri.localhost; script-src 'self' tauri: https://tauri.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' tauri: https://tauri.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost tauri: https://tauri.localhost; font-src 'self' data: tauri: https://tauri.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost tauri: https://tauri.localhost https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* http://[::1]:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Local companion app for InferGrade Hub runs
bundle.longDescription: Pairs with InferGrade Hub, keeps the local Runner listening, and surfaces Runner process logs without terminal access.
